## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI/CD

## Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] ESLint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Library builds successfully (`npm run build:lib`)
- [ ] Storybook builds (`npm run build-storybook`)
- [ ] New component exported from `src/components/index.ts`
- [ ] Story file added with `tags: ['autodocs']`
- [ ] Accessibility verified (keyboard navigation, aria attributes)
- [ ] `forwardRef` used on interactive components
- [ ] Props spread with `...rest` for native HTML attributes
- [ ] No magic numbers — all values from design tokens
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected for animations
